description:
Graduate DevOps / QA Engineer | DevOps, QA & Software Delivery | Adelaide (Hybrid)

A growing Australian technology company is hiring a Graduate DevOps / QA Engineer to support the delivery, quality, and operational reliability of modern software platforms used in data-intensive, mission-critical environments.
  
This is a structured graduate development role, designed for someone at the very start of their career who wants hands-on exposure to DevOps, testing, CI/CD, and production systems, while working closely with experienced engineers.
  
This is a great pathway into the industry, working closely to the Head of Engineering, gaining first-hand production experience & mentorship into best practices.
  
Graduate DevOps/QA Engineer Responsibilities

Supporting and improving CI/CD pipelines and build automation
Assisting with unit and integration testing across multiple systems
Helping maintain development and deployment environments
Supporting basic containerisation and deployment workflows
Assisting with monitoring, logging, and operational checks
Writing clear technical documentation, test evidence, and process notes
Participating in regular engineering syncs and learning from senior team members
This is a hands-on role with strong mentorship and gradual responsibility as your skills develop.
Graduate DevOps/QA Engineer Requirements

STEM degree (Computer Science, Software Engineering, Systems Engineering, IT, or similar)
Introductory experience with Python and/or scripting (academic or personal projects)
Understanding of software engineering principles and the development lifecycle
Basic knowledge of unit and integration testing
Familiarity with Linux / Unix environments
Strong willingness to learn DevOps, QA, and operational practices
Clear written and verbal communication skills
Exposure to CI/CD tools (any platform)
Basic understanding of containerisation (e.g. Docker)
Introductory exposure to cloud platforms
Awareness of monitoring and logging concepts
Experience with test automation frameworks
This is a fulltime position, based in Adelaide. If interested, please apply with your most up-to-date CV & I’ll be in touch!
